enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access GeoLens
pendingApprovalDescription: Your registration has been submitted. An administrator will review your request. You will be able to sign in once your account has been approved.
loginSubheadline: Sign in to organize collections, build maps, and work with the catalog in one place.
browseCatalogHelper: No account needed to browse the public catalog.

loginHighlights.collectionsCopy: Group datasets into collections you revisit and share.
loginHighlights.mapsCopy: Turn catalog data into styled, shareable maps.
loginHighlights.importsCopy: Upload new datasets and keep your workspace current.

registrationDisabledDescription: Account registration is currently not available. Contact an administrator for access.

oauthErrors.invalidGrant: Authentication was denied or expired. Please try again.
oauthErrors.accessDenied: Access was denied by the identity provider.
oauthErrors.domainNotAllowed: Your email domain is not permitted to sign in here.

ssoOnly.signInWithProvider: Sign in using your organization's identity provider below.
ssoOnly.adminPasswordSignIn: Admin? Sign in with a password

oauth.helper: Single sign-on is available when your organization has configured it.

alreadySignedIn: You're already signed in — redirected to home.
configLoadError: Unable to load registration settings. Please try again.
supportHint: Need access or a password reset? Contact a GeoLens administrator.
consentNote: By signing in you agree to our
consentNoteSuffix: . We may contact you about GeoLens.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.verifying: Verifying your email address, please wait...
verifyEmail.success: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.invalidDescription: This link has expired or has already been used. Enter your email address below to request a new one.
verifyEmail.resendSent: If an account with that email exists and is awaiting verification, a new link has been sent.

verificationPending.title: Check Your Email
verificationPending.description: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Click the link to activate your account.
verificationPending.resendSent: If your email address is registered and awaiting verification, a new link has been sent.
